context: Evaluates whether the agent implements a correct HTTP API authorization policy in Rego, decoding a JWT token to extract claims, matching on HTTP method and path, and allowing access based on user identity and manager-subordinate relationships.

checklist.name: default allow := false
checklist.description: The policy defaults to denying all requests with `default allow := false`

checklist.name: JWT decoded with io.jwt.decode
checklist.description: The policy decodes the JWT token from `input.token` using `io.jwt.decode` to extract claims

checklist.name: Matches on input.method and input.path
checklist.description: The allow rule checks `input.method` (e.g. `"GET"`) and `input.path` (as an array, e.g. `["finance", "salary", username]`)

checklist.name: Allow self and manager access
checklist.description: The policy allows a user to access their own record and allows managers to access their subordinates' records

checklist.name: Tests pass
checklist.description: All tests pass when running `opa test . -v`
